scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/worker && npm run lint -w packages/shared
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w apps/api
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/worker && npm run build -w apps/web
